variants.title: Mann Filter H 10 008 x Hydraulics | Replaces the Donaldson P552458
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter H 10 008 x Hydraulics | Replaces the Donaldson P552458
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 96.0 mm, Dimension B: 28.0 mm, Dimension H: 151.0 mm, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 27.9 mm, Length: 151.4 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P552458 Lube Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P552458 Lube Cartridge is designed to provide reliable performance in lube cartridge applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Lube Cartridge, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 27.9 mm, Length: 151.4 mm
